---
title: "03a_proteomics_differential"
author: "alexander-gysin (alexander.gysin@usz.ch)"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output: workflowr::wflow_html
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

# Setup and import

```{r setup_import}
library(tidyverse)
library(FactoMineR)
library(factoextra)
library(limma)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(msigdbr)
library(patchwork)
library(here)

# Knitr Config
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)

# Output paths
current_file <- "03a_proteomics_differential"
output_dir_data <- here::here("output", current_file)
if (!dir.exists(output_dir_data)) dir.create(output_dir_data, recursive = TRUE)

# Source Configuration & Engines
source(here::here("code", "00_config.R"))
source(here::here("code", "00_omics_engines.R"))

# Load Pre-Cleaned Data from Script 01
master_spine <- readRDS(here::here("output", "01_data_import_and_qc", "clinical_spine.rds"))
omics_mat <- readRDS(here::here("output", "01_data_import_and_qc", "clean_olink_matrix.rds"))

# Fetch GO Biological Processes Database for GSEA
go_genesets <- msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens", category = "C5", subcategory = "BP") %>% select(gs_name, gene_symbol)
```

# Analysis Configurator
```{r analysis_config}
# 1. Global Mathematical Thresholds
omics_config <- list(
  dea_p_cutoff   = 0.05, 
  dea_fc_cutoff  = 0.5,  
  gsea_p_cutoff  = 0.20, 
  gsea_min_size  = 3     
)

# 2. PCA Master Layouts (Independent grids)
pca_configs <- list(
  pca_global = list(
    title = "PCA: Global Cohort Structure",
    subset_to_contrast = NULL, 
    color_vars = c("cohort_group", "Sex", "Age", "Sample_Age") 
  ),
  pca_active = list(
    title = "PCA: Active vs Controls",
    subset_to_contrast = list(group_col = "cohort_group", target_groups = c(GRP_ACTIVE, GRP_CONTROL)),
    color_vars = c("cohort_group", "Sex", "Age", "Sample_Age")
  ),
  pca_nonactive = list(
    title = "PCA: Nonactive vs Controls",
    subset_to_contrast = list(group_col = "cohort_group", target_groups = c(GRP_NON_ACTIVE, GRP_CONTROL)),
    color_vars = c("cohort_group", "Sex", "Age", "Sample_Age")
  )
)

# 3. Differential Expression Contrasts (Target vs Reference)
contrast_configs <- list(
  active_vs_control = list(
    title = "Active vs Control",
    group_col = "cohort_group",
    target_groups = c(GRP_ACTIVE),
    ref_groups = c(GRP_CONTROL),
    is_continuous = FALSE,
    covariates = c("Age", "Sex")
  ),
  nonactive_vs_control = list(
    title = "Nonactive vs Control",
    group_col = "cohort_group",
    target_groups = c(GRP_NON_ACTIVE),
    ref_groups = c(GRP_CONTROL),
    is_continuous = FALSE,
    covariates = c("Age", "Sex")
  ),
  active_vs_nonactive = list(
    title = "Active vs Nonactive",
    group_col = "cohort_group",
    target_groups = c(GRP_ACTIVE),
    ref_groups = c(GRP_NON_ACTIVE),
    is_continuous = FALSE,
    covariates = c("Age", "Sex")
  ),
  active_vs_nonactive_uncorrected = list(
    title = "Active vs Nonactive (Uncorrected)",
    group_col = "cohort_group",
    target_groups = c(GRP_ACTIVE),
    ref_groups = c(GRP_NON_ACTIVE),
    is_continuous = FALSE,
    covariates = c()
  )
)

# 4. Cross-Contrast Trajectory Plots
cross_contrasts <- list(
  active_vs_nonactive_trajectory = list(
    title = "Trajectory: Active vs Nonactive",
    x_axis_contrast = "active_vs_control",      
    y_axis_contrast = "nonactive_vs_control",   
    top_n_specific  = 5,  # Limit for X-only and Y-only drivers
    top_n_shared    = 5  # Global limit for Shared drivers based on combined Pi-Score
  )
)

# 5. Heatmap Configuration
heatmap_config <- list(
  top_n = 50,
  split_by_group = FALSE, # Set to TRUE if you want to force Active/Control/Nonactive groups
  row_font_size = 8
)

# 6. Comparative Settings (UpSet & Pathway Trajectories)
# Note: We use the same 'cross_contrasts' list, but these parameters guide the new plots
cross_contrasts$disease_flare_trajectory$top_n_upset <- 10      # Proteins to label in intersection
cross_contrasts$disease_flare_trajectory$top_n_pathways <- 20   # Pathways to plot in trajectory

# 7. LASSO Feature Selection
# We only run LASSO on binary classifications of interest
lasso_configs <- list(
  active_vs_nonactive = list(
    title = "Predictors: Active vs Nonactive",
    group_col = "cohort_group",
    target_groups = c(GRP_ACTIVE, GRP_NON_ACTIVE)
  )
)

cat("Pipelines and Mathematical Engines fully configured.\n")
```

# Execution Engines
## PCA
```{r execution_engine_PCA, fig.width=8, fig.height=8}
cat("### Executing Principal Component Analysis...\n\n")

pca_base_dir <- file.path(output_dir_data, "PCA")
if (!dir.exists(pca_base_dir)) dir.create(pca_base_dir, recursive = TRUE)

for (pca_name in names(pca_configs)) {
  conf <- pca_configs[[pca_name]]
  cat(sprintf("#### Building: %s\n", conf$title))
  
  pca_sub_dir <- file.path(pca_base_dir, pca_name)
  if (!dir.exists(pca_sub_dir)) dir.create(pca_sub_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  
  # Run the abstracted engine
  pca_plots <- run_pca_engine(omics_mat, master_spine, conf, get_project_colors)
  
  # Save individual pure plots (These maintain their FULL comprehensive titles)
  for (p_name in names(pca_plots)) {
    if (!is.null(pca_plots[[p_name]])) {
      ggsave(
        filename = file.path(pca_sub_dir, paste0(pca_name, "_", p_name, ".png")), 
        plot = pca_plots[[p_name]], 
        width = 7, height = 6, dpi = 300, bg = "white"
      )
    }
  }
  
  # 1. Print Unmerged Scree Plot
  if (!is.null(pca_plots[["scree"]])) {
    print(pca_plots[["scree"]])
    cat("\n\n")
  }
  
  # 2. Print Unmerged Loadings Plot
  if (!is.null(pca_plots[["loadings"]])) {
    print(pca_plots[["loadings"]])
    cat("\n\n")
  }
  
  # 3. Stitch and Print PC1 & PC2 Drivers together SAFELY
  driver_list <- purrr::compact(list(pca_plots[["pc1_drivers"]], pca_plots[["pc2_drivers"]]))
  
  if (length(driver_list) > 0) {
    # NEW: Strip redundant prefixes for the merged driver grid
    if(length(driver_list) >= 1) driver_list[[1]] <- driver_list[[1]] + labs(title = "Top PC1 Drivers")
    if(length(driver_list) >= 2) driver_list[[2]] <- driver_list[[2]] + labs(title = "Top PC2 Drivers")
    
    master_driver_grid <- wrap_plots(plotlist = driver_list, ncol = 2) + 
      plot_annotation(
        title = sprintf("%s: PCA Variance Drivers", conf$title), 
        tag_levels = 'A', 
        theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"))
      )
    print(master_driver_grid)
    cat("\n\n")
    ggsave(file.path(pca_sub_dir, paste0(pca_name, "_Merged_Drivers.png")), master_driver_grid, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300, bg="white")
  }
  
  # 4. Stitch and Print Scatter Overlays SAFELY
  overlay_plot_names <- grep("^overlay_", names(pca_plots), value = TRUE)
  overlay_plots <- purrr::compact(pca_plots[overlay_plot_names])
  
  if (length(overlay_plots) > 0) {
    
    # NEW: Strip redundant prefixes for the merged scatter grid
    for (i in seq_along(overlay_plots)) {
      # Extract the variable name from the list name (e.g., "overlay_Sex" -> "Sex")
      c_var <- sub("^overlay_", "", names(overlay_plots)[i])
      
      # Overwrite the plot title in memory
      overlay_plots[[i]] <- overlay_plots[[i]] + labs(title = sprintf("Colored by %s", c_var))
    }
    
    master_scatter_grid <- wrap_plots(plotlist = overlay_plots, ncol = 2) + 
      plot_annotation(
        title = conf$title, 
        subtitle = "Colored Scatter Overlays",
        tag_levels = 'A', 
        theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"))
      )
    print(master_scatter_grid)
    cat("\n\n")
    ggsave(file.path(pca_sub_dir, paste0(pca_name, "_Merged_Scatter_Overlays.png")), master_scatter_grid, width = 14, height = 12, dpi = 300, bg="white")
  }
}
```

## Differential Expression Analysis & GSEA
```{r execution_engine_DEA_GSEA, fig.width=8,fig.height=8}
cat("### Executing Differential Expression & Contrast-Specific Discovery...\n\n")

dea_base_dir <- file.path(output_dir_data, "DEA")
if (!dir.exists(dea_base_dir)) dir.create(dea_base_dir, recursive = TRUE)

master_dea_results <- list()
master_gsea_results <- list() 

for (c_name in names(contrast_configs)) {
  conf <- contrast_configs[[c_name]]
  cat(sprintf("#### Contrast: %s\n", conf$title))
  
  dea_sub_dir <- file.path(dea_base_dir, c_name)
  if (!dir.exists(dea_sub_dir)) dir.create(dea_sub_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  
  # 1. Limma DEA
  limma_res <- run_limma_engine(omics_mat, master_spine, conf, omics_config, get_project_colors)
  if (is.null(limma_res)) next
  
  master_dea_results[[c_name]] <- limma_res$data 
  write_csv(limma_res$data, file.path(dea_sub_dir, paste0(c_name, "_DEA_Results.csv")))
  print(limma_res$volcano); cat("\n\n")
  ggsave(file.path(dea_sub_dir, paste0(c_name, "_Volcano.png")), limma_res$volcano, width = 8, height = 7, dpi=300)

  # 2. Heatmap (Top 50)
  h50 <- run_heatmap_engine(omics_mat, master_spine, limma_res$data, title = conf$title, 
                            n_top = heatmap_config$top_n, split_by_group = heatmap_config$split_by_group)
  draw(h50); cat("\n\n")
  png(file.path(dea_sub_dir, paste0(c_name, "_Heatmap_Top50.png")), width=10, height=12, units="in", res=300)
  draw(h50); dev.off()

  # 3. GSEA
  gsea_res <- run_gsea_engine(limma_res$data, go_genesets, omics_config, conf$title)
  if (!is.null(gsea_res)) {
    master_gsea_results[[c_name]] <- gsea_res$data 
    write_csv(gsea_res$data, file.path(dea_sub_dir, paste0(c_name, "_GSEA_Full_Results.csv")))
    print(gsea_res$dotplot); cat("\n\n")
    ggsave(file.path(dea_sub_dir, paste0(c_name, "_GSEA_Dotplot.png")), gsea_res$dotplot, width = 9, height = 7, dpi=300)
    if(!is.null(gsea_res$ridgeplot)) {
      print(gsea_res$ridgeplot); cat("\n\n")
      ggsave(file.path(dea_sub_dir, paste0(c_name, "_GSEA_Ridgeplot.png")), gsea_res$ridgeplot, width = 9, height = 8, dpi=300)
    }
  }
    
  # 4. LASSO (Automated for every contrast)
  lasso_res <- run_lasso_engine(omics_mat, master_spine, conf$group_col, 
                                c(conf$target_groups, conf$ref_groups), title = conf$title)
  if (!is.null(lasso_res)) {
    write_csv(lasso_res$data, file.path(dea_sub_dir, paste0(c_name, "_LASSO_Coefficients.csv")))
    
    # Tuning Plot (Base R)
    plot(lasso_res$cv_plot); title(main = sprintf("%s: LASSO Model Tuning", conf$title), line = 2.5)
    cat("\n\n")
    
    # Weight Plot (ggplot)
    print(lasso_res$coeff_plot); cat("\n\n")
    ggsave(file.path(dea_sub_dir, paste0(c_name, "_LASSO_Weights.png")), lasso_res$coeff_plot, width=7, height=6, dpi=300)
  }
}
```

## Trajectory Mapping
```{r execution_engine_trajectory, fig.width=8, fig.height=8}
cat("### Executing Comparative Analysis...\n\n")

traj_base_dir <- file.path(output_dir_data, "Trajectories")
if (!dir.exists(traj_base_dir)) dir.create(traj_base_dir, recursive = TRUE)

for (cross_name in names(cross_contrasts)) {
  conf <- cross_contrasts[[cross_name]]
  
  if (is.null(conf$x_axis_contrast) || is.null(conf$y_axis_contrast)) next
  
  cat(sprintf("#### Comparison: %s\n", conf$title))
  traj_sub_dir <- file.path(traj_base_dir, cross_name)
  if (!dir.exists(traj_sub_dir)) dir.create(traj_sub_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  
  dea_x <- master_dea_results[[conf$x_axis_contrast]]
  dea_y <- master_dea_results[[conf$y_axis_contrast]]
  gsea_x <- master_gsea_results[[conf$x_axis_contrast]]
  gsea_y <- master_gsea_results[[conf$y_axis_contrast]]

  # 1. Protein Trajectory
  if (!is.null(dea_x) && !is.null(dea_y)) {
    p_traj <- run_cross_contrast_engine(dea_x, dea_y, conf, omics_config, 
                                        contrast_configs[[conf$x_axis_contrast]]$title, 
                                        contrast_configs[[conf$y_axis_contrast]]$title,
                                        get_project_colors(contrast_configs[[conf$x_axis_contrast]]$target_groups[1]),
                                        get_project_colors(contrast_configs[[conf$y_axis_contrast]]$target_groups[1]),
                                        COLOR_HIGHLIGHT)
    if (!is.null(p_traj)) {
      print(p_traj); cat("\n\n")
      ggsave(file.path(traj_sub_dir, paste0(cross_name, "_Protein_Trajectory.png")), p_traj, width=9, height=9, dpi=300, bg="white")
    }

    # --- 2. Venn Diagram (Signature Overlap) ---
    cat("##### Feature Intersection (Venn Diagram)\n")
    
    clean_title <- sub("^Trajectory:\\s*", "", conf$title)
    color_x <- get_project_colors(contrast_configs[[conf$x_axis_contrast]]$target_groups[1])
    color_y <- get_project_colors(contrast_configs[[conf$y_axis_contrast]]$target_groups[1])
    
    # PASS IN THE 00_CONFIG COLORS
    p_venn <- run_venn_engine(
      dea_x = dea_x, 
      dea_y = dea_y, 
      name_x = contrast_configs[[conf$x_axis_contrast]]$title, 
      name_y = contrast_configs[[conf$y_axis_contrast]]$title,
      omics_config = omics_config,
      title = clean_title,
      color_x = color_x,
      color_y = color_y,
      color_shared = "black"
    )

    if (!is.null(p_venn)) {
      print(p_venn); cat("\n\n")
      ggsave(file.path(traj_sub_dir, paste0(cross_name, "_Venn_Intersection.png")), p_venn, width=8, height=6, dpi=300, bg="white")
    } else {
      cat("*No significant features available to compute intersection.*\n\n")
    }
  }

  # 3. Pathway Trajectory
  if (!is.null(gsea_x) && !is.null(gsea_y)) {
    p_path_traj <- run_pathway_trajectory_engine(gsea_x, gsea_y, conf, 
                                                 contrast_configs[[conf$x_axis_contrast]]$title, 
                                                 contrast_configs[[conf$y_axis_contrast]]$title)
    if (!is.null(p_path_traj)) {
      print(p_path_traj); cat("\n\n")
      ggsave(file.path(traj_sub_dir, paste0(cross_name, "_Pathway_Trajectory.png")), p_path_traj, width=11, height=9, dpi=300, bg="white")
    }
  }
}
```

# Appendix
```{r print_engine, code=readLines(here::here("code", "00_omics_engines.R")), eval=FALSE}

```
